main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'CaSO4 etapa 3 + recovery 80→83 sin aumentar antiincrustante proporcional + sulfato↑ por mix' literal.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (sílice, biofouling, MECH compactación, source water change).

recommended_action.justification: Aumentar antiscalant 2.2→3.2 ppm + reducir recovery 81% + 'if acid CIP fails' (implícito); CIP secuencial explícito no visible.

requested_data.justification: Pide molar antiscalant concentration en concentrate + LSI — match accepted (SI yeso).

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: ΔP no decrece 48h + ácido CIP falla → switch.
